meanings.definition: 1/60 of a minute; the basic unit of time adopted under the Systeme International d'Unites
the fielding position of the player on a baseball team who is stationed near the second of the bases in the infield

examples: the moment he arrived the party began

meanings.definition: following the first in an ordering or series
examples: he came in a close second

meanings.definition: a 60th part of a minute of arc
examples: the treasure is 2 minutes and 45 seconds south of here

meanings.definition: the official attendant of a contestant in a duel or boxing match
the gear that has the second lowest forward gear ratio in the gear box of a motor vehicle
examples: he had to shift down into second to make the hill

meanings.definition: merchandise that has imperfections; usually sold at a reduced price without the brand name
give support or one's approval to
transfer an employee to a different, temporary assignment
examples: The officer was seconded for duty overseas

meanings.definition: coming next after the first in position in space or time or degree or magnitude
a part or voice or instrument or orchestra section lower in pitch than or subordinate to the first

examples: second, we must consider the economy
